title: Divide Pages
metaDescription: Split PDF pages into multiple sections. Divide pages horizontally or vertically.
description:
Divide Pages splits individual PDF pages into multiple sections. Cut pages horizontally, vertically, or into a grid to create multiple pages from one.

Perfect for splitting scanned documents with multiple items per page, or dividing large format pages into standard sizes.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Set Division
howToUse.description: Choose horizontal, vertical, or grid division and set the number of sections.

howToUse.title: Divide and Download
howToUse.description: Click Divide to split pages and download.

useCases.title: Split Scans
useCases.description: Divide scanned pages containing multiple documents.

useCases.title: Resize Pages
useCases.description: Split large pages into standard paper sizes.

useCases.title: Create Cards
useCases.description: Divide pages into card-sized sections for printing.

faq.question: Can I divide into unequal sections?
faq.answer: Currently, divisions are equal. Use Crop PDF for custom sections.

faq.question: What happens to content at division lines?
faq.answer: Content is split at the division line; ensure important content is not at boundaries.

faq.question: Can I divide specific pages only?
faq.answer: Yes, you can select which pages to divide.
